profile.name: Stevan Lim, S.Kom.
profile.headline: Full-Stack Web & Mobile Developer
about: I am a Programmer and Web/Mobile Application Developer graduated from STMIK Pontianak (S.Kom.), specializing in high-performance frontend and backend systems.
I focus on writing clean, efficient, and well-structured code. I am active on GitHub exploring open-source repositories and collaborating with teams on real-world projects.

research.narrative: I am dedicated to engineering high-performance web and mobile software. I focus on developing clean, responsive frontends and well-optimized backend systems that solve practical business problems.

focus.name: Web Systems
focus.description: Building reactive and SEO-optimized web applications with SvelteKit, Laravel, Next.js, and React.

focus.name: Mobile Engineering
focus.description: Developing cross-platform and native mobile applications using NativeScript, React Native, and Android Studio.

focus.name: Database Architecture
focus.description: Designing and managing relational and non-relational database architectures with clean REST API integrations.

projects.name: Traffic Barang
projects.summary: Inventory management and automated traffic logging platform built for PT. Segi Tiga Asia. Tracks stock level, supplier, and sale reports.

projects.name: Toup SS Computer
projects.summary: Platform for game top-ups, mobile vouchers, and electricity tokens with a direct customer support portal built with SvelteKit and NativeScript.

projects.name: SS Computer Portal
projects.summary: Custom web application focusing on customer services registration, ticketing, and computer repair catalogs.

projects.name: Kustore Design
projects.summary: High-fidelity user interface design and prototype for a game top-up application featuring dark mode and seamless checkout.

projects.name: Indoflazz Design
projects.summary: Interface design and interactive prototype for Indoflazz mobile top-up app, blending modern dark mode aesthetics with concise product listings.

projects.name: KPR Rumah Impian
projects.summary: Figma landing page design for home ownership credit (KPR), featuring an intuitive mortgage calculator and high-impact CTA sections.

footer: Building efficient digital solutions and sharing open source systems.
